item.title: [AINews] OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol / Terra / Luna — restricted to trusted partners
item.description: Focus: Oddly tiered releases to both OAI and ANT on the same day.

item.title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: Beating a career slump, adding more structure to an established team, questions for new-team 1:1s, the evolving shape of the growth role, and more
